# BP-104 positive: a ServeMux receives the same literal pattern twice.
lang: go
file: BP-104-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "net/http"

func routes() {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	mux.HandleFunc("/admin", admin)
	mux.HandleFunc("/admin", admin)
}

func admin(http.ResponseWriter, *http.Request) {}
